data.name: Femdom Hero 2
data.detailed_description:
You and Lyra make your way to Damar, a town that has recently had a huge spike of monster sightings. On the entirety of your journey there, Lyra mercilessly torments you by riding you as if you were her own personal pony, and her sadistic bullying doesn't stop even when you arrive. The next day, you wake up early to stock up on gear before you and Lyra leave, but the herbalist in the town has a secret, she's secretly a witch, and her intentions are clear, to drain your essence by making you ejaculate as much as possible.

Experience a day of being bullied by Lyra, your childhood friend, and being drained by Kurowi, the eccentric witch.

  • ~1.8K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 17 Unique character images

  • 23 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 繁體中文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
